request.complaint: ami taka pathiyechen but lok ta pay nai, please check.

response.agent_summary: Ticket logged. Single transaction match found (None). Routed to customer_support for follow-up.

response.customer_reply: We have received your request. For your security, please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone. Our support team will review the case and contact you through official support channels.
